IVS Integrity Report — Dashboard Tabs Audited Individually, by Project

Three dashboard tabs, each its own section, each organized strictly by Project Name: Programs · Mfg Roadmap · Risk Register

Section: Programs. For each of the 131 programs the dashboard renders, all six drawer sub-tabs are audited: Overall Status, Snapshot, Team, Timeline (gate milestones), Decision, and Supply Chain Node. Decision and Supply Chain Node do not exist as distinct dashboard elements — see the notes inside each project block. Overall Status and Snapshot are shown verbatim but marked [UNVERIFIABLE] because the live R3/R2 source reports no longer expose a Sheet Name column this session. Team, Timeline, and Decision-analog rows carry genuine [VERIFIED]/[DISCREPANCY] flags against live R5/R6 source data.
131 projects shown
▸ AHR Agonist

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
No decision-like workstream entries found for this project. NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.

Workstream: DS & DP - Post PPQ & PAI MfgStatus: Yellow
Particulate investigation in progress - currently gating production restart and Part B. Forecast shared with Catalent, supports DS and DP runs to support QC China requirement, Reference standard, PAI, Launch, and Stability.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Workstream: PAI Readiness (DS, DP, Vial Pkg)Status: Green
"Catalent - High risk items 96% complete. Isolator cleaning risk assessment, smoke study with 2ml vial and forceps storage re-design/qual to be completed end Aug\n\nAlmac – Almac PAI readiness projected 31st Jul 2026"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Delivery SystemStatus: Green
ADD and PDM availability for Part B clinical use in June 2026. 3Y accelerated aging testing data to support 3Y shelf life available by November 2026.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Launch Supply PlanningStatus: Green
Supply launch planning realigned with revised resubmission timing. ▸ Bimagrumab
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 21May2026Status:
"•\tPIC approved the HFpEF Ph2 (GIDK) study design and associated funding in early May."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 21May2026Status:
"•\tClinical was asked post PIC to assess fully outsourcing the GIDK trial. RFPs were sent out to 3 different CROs, and a final decision on whether this trial will be functionally sourced or fully outsourced is expected by the end of June.\no\tThe team was initially planning to a 28SEP FPV. Leadership is aware that FPV will move to Q4’26 with the timing impact TBD."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 21May2026Status:
"•\tIND authoring updates are in-progress for the CMC modules with content lock planned by mid-June. Content related to the WCB and incorporation into the DS process will be added as well as updating the stability protocols to maximize dating on the DP vials."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 21May2026Status:
"•\tThe device optionality workstream kicked off in late April to inform the lead device presentations to develop to enable Ph3 and commercialization for the 450mg and 600mg dose strengths. One output from this on-going assessment is to collect device functionality data at both room and cold temperature. The collection of this data is in progress."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 21May2026Status:
"•\tNext milestones/key events:\no\tHFpEF IND submission – TBD dependent on sourcing model for trial\no\tFPV for GIDK – Q4’26; exact timing TBD dependent on sourcing model for trial\no\tFRD – currently projected for Q4’29"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
CMC Meeting Minutes 21May2026"•\tClinical was asked post PIC to assess fully outsourcing the GIDK trial. RFPs were sent out to 3 different CROs, and a final decision on whether this trial will be functionally sourced or fully outsourced is expected by the end of June.\no\tThe team was initially planning to a 28SEP FPV. Leadership is aware that FPV will move to Q4’26 with the timing impact TBD."NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ Brenipatide
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: DS (C2)Status: Green
"a.) Asymchem: GMP batches 1 & 2 completed / shipped to LSL. Batches 3 & 4 mfg completed. 5th batch mfg completed as well, add’l milling being implemented ahead of PV. CoA release pending on all batches. \nb.) AFP on track for Asymchem batches 1 & 2 by 15 April.\nc.) Corden: GMP batch 1 delivery delayed until May; batches 2 & 3 to be released as CT material in 2H 2026, all off critical path for RS deliverables. Continued delay in Corden batch 1 delivery prevents inclusion in DP RS cartridge campaign."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DS (C3)Status: Red
"a.) PV PAR activities in various stages of completion (WuXi: SPPS, API precipitation; internal: cleavage, purification, TFF).\nb.) MLT sourced Asymchem for crude synthesis with Novartis (Switzerland) for purification. Novartis readiness projecting 12M delay to FS. Agreement reached with mfg leadership to begin assessing contingency (Asymchem for purification). Response rcv’d from Asymchem & under evaluation by API-EM.\nc.) Team aligning on at-scale demo batch scope (GMP/non-GMP) at Asymchem, with pre-PPQ target start end May / early June."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: INCOG (SFS)Status: Red
"a.) Gap assessment ongoing. Line 2 media fills ongoing.\nb.) VI deviation closed 19Feb; team working through expediting release of critical batches for packaging allocations. Several batches pending AFU; needed for packaging orders for ongoing CT support.\nc.) GQAAC audit response: batch manufacturing on-hold pending GQAAC Audit Remediation. Pending INCOG readiness plans.\nd.) RS SFS strategy being re-visited. Slots for RS1 and RS2 campaigns are pending scheduling with INCOG (dependent on audit remediation efforts) and therefore team is evaluating various scenarios"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Simtra\n(vials)"Status: Yellow
"a.) Analytical method transfers / approvals ongoing. DS dispensing completed (IPM) and arrived at Simtra.\nb.) QtA still pending; required prior to GMP manufacture.\nc.) Engineering batch successfully completed, GMP mfg starting 13April. Batch release in May."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Feg.\n(carts)"Status: Green
"a.) MLT sourced C2 cartridges to Fegersheim (C2 only)\nb.) Gap assessment ongoing. Engineering batch scheduled for May with GMP mfg targeted June ‘26"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DPStatus: Green
"a.) MLT sourced both Sesto and IPM for PV (cartridges). Ongoing alignment for PPQ batch sizes and timing of dual-sourced campaigns. PV batch sizes for SFS aligned to be 400L.\nb.) Preserved (cartridge) demo stability for weekly dose strengths, and SFS demo stability for monthly dose range were set down at PPD end of Feb. \nc.) ASAP to evaluate (1) +/- methionine in non preserved formulation, (2) preserved formulation, and (3) DS comparability has started and data expected by end of March."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DDCSStatus: Green
"a.) FDA accepted rationale to bridge PFS to AI (Irma). Received NeuroLT alignment to remove PFS -> AI bridging study from plan.\nb.) IDAP activities on track to support first AI RS campaign (pending confirmation of new RS schedule from INCOG)\nc.) Boone will not be included in AUD FS (v5 redesign required prior to conducting BE device bridging study). Team working through implementation of Boone, potentially targeting MDD FS (dependent on Boone v5 timelines), and therefore no changes to RS cartridge campaign timing at Fegersheim."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
No decision-like workstream entries found for this project. NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ CD19/CD3 TCE

Workstream: Key Program UpdatesStatus:
"- BoD meeting May 20 for late phase strategy alignment (possible direct to ph3) ~FRD Q2 2028\n- 3mo tox findings did not reveal new or unexpected safety risks beyond what was already understood from earlier studies; program trajectory and regulatory strategy remain unchanged \n- Team submitted FDA request for chronic tox waiver – response expected Apr 21"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Key Program Updates"- BoD meeting May 20 for late phase strategy alignment (possible direct to ph3) ~FRD Q2 2028\n- 3mo tox findings did not reveal new or unexpected safety risks beyond what was already understood from earlier studies; program trajectory and regulatory strategy remain unchanged \n- Team submitted FDA request for chronic tox waiver – response expected Apr 21"NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]

▸ CLRN1
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 15Jun2026Status:
Visible particle risk now materialized in drug product – first confirmed potential visible particle in CLRN1 DP (post-fill, 02 Jun), a material escalation from earlier drug substance findings, with similar observations across multiple AAV programs pointing to a platform-level signal.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 15Jun2026Status:
"Root cause unconfirmed; visual inspection method is the gap – significant variability and subjectivity in visual inspection (timing, swirling, analyst bias) undermine data reliability; forensic analysis targeted ~19 Jun, with method improvement / \"overcome testing\" under debate to sequence first."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 15Jun2026Status:
IND timeline under acute pressure (~60 days to submission) – milestones tracked via daily huddles; labeling delays tied to document approvals with expedited-approval recovery plans in progress.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 15Jun2026Status:
Manufacturing and analytics largely on track with known gaps – TF Plainville fill complete and methods qualified except capsid ID (GMP-ready end of June) and Rep52 (closeout end of May); stability primarily at T0; PPD requesting rapid analytical turnaround that directly gates release and stability.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 15Jun2026Status:
Resourcing and leadership aligned ahead of governance – Alexa Mealy onboarded to lead functional potency assay development (long-lead, IND-critical); the June 1 Board reviewed the integrated development plan and sought approval of plan-to-launch and updated budget.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
No decision-like workstream entries found for this project. NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ Elora/TZP Coformulation

Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
No decision-like workstream entries found for this project. NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ Eloralintide
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Device OptionalityStatus:
"IRMA w/SDV as contingency\nMFD/Boone w/MDV as contingency\nKwikPen addition at CD3 as contingency for Boone not being ready at commercial scale by launch."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Substance\n Hybrid route"Status: Yellow
"Pivotal: 55kg complete from Asymchem. Additional expected 12kg from Ajinimoto- Belgium by July 2026.\n\nRS: SPPS fragments complete. Condensation at Kinsale ongoing. Purification of SPPS (expected in July) & LPPS fragments at Asymchem.\n\nPV: SPPS Fragments PAR work ongoing at Asymchem. ENG fragments expected start in April."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Product – Eloralintide (4\n doses)"Status: Yellow
"SFS (non-preserved) at INCOG: Resupplies on line 2 (135L) 6mg . KO with RTP on 08Apr, TT RS batches in Q4'26\n \nSDV (non-preserved) at Simtra (9mg only for BE): ENG complete, GMP batch in May. \n \n2.7ml Cartridges at Sesto (preserved): GMP filling & VI complete."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Drug Product – Elora/TZP (7 dose combinations)Status: Yellow
"SFS at Patheon Ferentino (non-preserved): 7LY+1PBO mfg complete. VI & testing ongoing.\n\nResupply on ST6 being planned in May-July. ENG batch ongoing. \nPreserved: Siting at Fegersheim."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Analytical\n Monotherapy and co-formulation"Status: Green
Monotherapy and co-formulation methods being installed at Solvias and PPD.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DDCSStatus: Yellow
"KwikPen assembly: Pending MLT siting approval Sesto in May. \n Boone assembly: SMC in schedule for Q3’26 for Ph3b PHA identified severity rating of “5” for elora patients on insulin. Banded Ompi syringe readiness by May 2026."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Sub-Tab: Snapshot
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Pivotal Aji DS: Purification ongoing; expected in July.\nRS DS : SPPS fragments condensation at Kinsale ongoing, purification start at Asymchem in July. CPS fragments ongoing at Wuxi\nPV DS: Ongoing PAR work for SPPS fragments PV at Asymchem. ENG fragments start on 17April.\nElora mono (SFS): INCOG batch mfg on line 2 pending GQAAC remediation. RTP KO on 08Apr, TT to enable RS batches in Q4'26\nElora/TZP coform (SFS): GMP mfg of 7LY+1PBO complete. VI ongoing. \nSingle Dose Vial at Simtra: ENG run at Simtra complete; GMP (9mg only for BE) expected in May\nElora mono (preserved carts): GMP mfg completeOn-time: Green · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Boone assembly in SMC in Q3'26 for a Ph3b. CMH did not align with Boone in EN-5 (H2H) or EN-8. Options of T2D Ph3s or EN-11 KwikPen assembly and siting still pending MLT approval (9mg only in BE in Q3'26, IDAP A5 Spacer Insertion Machine cancelled (or paused).On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]

4366607 CS Currently on track for Q3 '26. CMC R&D route development work completed with 2 of 3 fragments delivered. $200k funding approved from COO to begin API-0 (ETD November '26).On-time: Green · Timeframe: 2026-05-15UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
BoD approved $1.5M spend to accelerate 4366607 on 2/15/2026.On-time: Green · Timeframe: 2026-02-16UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
API-SM spend for 4366607 triggered and to begin after Lunar New Year (March '26)On-time: Green · Timeframe: 2026-02-16UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
BoD voted to terminate 4315738 (Effort 1-2) on 2/15/2026. Effort 1-2 will no longer updated.On-time: · Timeframe: 2026-02-16UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
4366607 - Stage 2b tox (4-day rat & dog DE) in progress. First data readout in last week of May'26.On-time: Green · Timeframe: 2026-05-15UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
4362060 (fused lactam) to begin Stage 3 Pilot tox in May. Interim data readout expected mid-June '26. If data shows no elevated liver enzymes or liver findings, team will request BoD meeting to fund API-0 (GLP-tox supply) with goal of FTD in Jan '27.On-time: Green · Timeframe: 2026-05-18UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Lead molecule 4366607 St2b tox readout was negative at 300mpk dosing.On-time: · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
CS currently listed in Pelagos as 6/15/2026 and FTD as 10/24/2026. Timelines are unrecoverable. Currently CS on track for end Q3'26 with FTD in Q1'27.On-time: · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]

▸ Imlunestrant (SERD)
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Imlunestrant (Inluriyo) received approval in US from FDA.Status:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Imlunestrant have launched in the US as of Oct 16th.Status:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Imlunestrant have received approval in EU and Japan in Jan. 2026, in Korea, UK and Australia in Feb. 2026.Status:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: In Mar. 2026, per preservERA readout, OBU leadership decided not to pursue EMBER-5 study, and will delay EMBER-4 study extension proposal until after IA1 in November 2026Status:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Project Cicada development ongoing. Currently, ready to make tablets to support RBA study taking place Q2 of 2026. A BE study in Q3 of 2026 will follow depending on RBA interim data. The RBA IP will be supported through Wuxi STA for both DS and DP. The BE IP will be supported through Wuxi STA for DS and Patheon Toronto for DP. RBA and BE study is currently on hold until next decision point to trigger. Submission enabling work moving at normal pace.Status:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Team kicked off submission prep Draft 1 meeting on May 18th. Current submission date for Adjuvant Breast Cancer Therapy projected in Jan/Feb 2027 timeframe.Status:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Commercial DS - Steps 1 & 2 at WuXi, Steps 3 & 4 at Lilly Kinsale (high containment steps)Status:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Commercial DP - 200mg tablets, HSWG (high containment) DP mfg and primary packaging (bottles and blisters) at Recipharm, SpainStatus:
UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Project Cicada development ongoing. Currently, ready to make tablets to support RBA study taking place Q2 of 2026. A BE study in Q3 of 2026 will follow depending on RBA interim data. The RBA IP will be supported through Wuxi STA for both DS and DP. The BE IP will be supported through Wuxi STA for DS and Patheon Toronto for DP. RBA and BE study is currently on hold until next decision point to trigger. Submission enabling work moving at normal pace.NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ Insulin Efsitora Alfa
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: DP Analytical Method Transfer & Validation (AI)Status: Green
Method transfers to Incog and Eurofins Lancaster are in process target completion prior to PV. CSC minutes aligning specs for PV completed 16Mar2026.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: RegulatoryStatus: Green
KwikPen submissions complete in 37 countries in 2025. RTQs in progress for EU (d180), US, TW, ACCESS, and JP.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Product\n Non-preserved (syringe/AI)"Status: Red
Demo batch fill to delayed to 11 May 2026. AVI schedule is still TBD potentially impacting PPQ timeline. GQAAC inspection findings returned to Incog; remediation activities related to Incog's CAPA plan causing delays in PPQ timeline of at least months. Detailed plan and timeline from Incog pending. Risk of expiring DS (current batches for Incog PPQ expire Aug-Oct) leading into material obsolescence and/or commercial material needs to support PPQ.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Device  (IRMA)\n PV Readiness"Status: Green
"DV Results Review Complete: All executed Commercial DV and non-HF validation testing for the Efsitora Irma autoinjector met acceptance criteria. No failed tests were identified. The DV Summary Report is on track for QualityDocs approval before May 8, 2026, pending closure of defined action items."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: New Formulation Work – Multi-fixed Doses, PreservedStatus: Green
"Bioassay assessment shows feasibility at 100% but inconsistent results for 50% and 150% purity levels necessary for validation. A parallel method is proposed that can potentially remediate the issue. Initial assessment are promising. \nCosting and timeline estimates being refined for Boone device to foster decision to proceed or not."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
New Formulation Work – Multi-fixed Doses, Preserved"Bioassay assessment shows feasibility at 100% but inconsistent results for 50% and 150% purity levels necessary for validation. A parallel method is proposed that can potentially remediate the issue. Initial assessment are promising. \nCosting and timeline estimates being refined for Boone device to foster decision to proceed or not."NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ IsoAsp-FcRn

▸ LAARA II
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 11Jun2026Status:
"•\tPortfolio role: LAARA II & III are next gen amylin peptides designed to improve tolerability vs. eloralintide while enabling potential longer-acting and combination strategies."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 11Jun2026Status:
"•\tDifferentiation approach: Parallel programs test complementary biology—LAARA II balances AMY1R/3R for efficacy; LAARA III is AMY1R selective to optimize tolerability – down-selection planned after Ph1 data and may also inform QM LAARA program and future amylin portfolio."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 11Jun2026Status:
"•\tStatus: LAARA II FHD 29Sep2026; LAARA III FHD Dec 2026; Both programs advancing in parallel with active CMC execution (manufacturing, release, and clinical supply preparation underway)."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 11Jun2026Status:
"•\tKey risks: LAARA III vendor-driven manufacturing constraints pressuring timeline to Dec FHD and require close management."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

▸ Lepodisiran
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Drug SubstanceStatus: Yellow
"• API EM will launch at Agilent, Colorado. 2 mol Launch FBR synthesizer design and build underway to support PV and Launch. \n• 400 mmol Agilent synthesizer NHU runs underway. Registration stability campaigns begin 3Q 2026. 5 x 9.5kg batches will closely match approach at PV.\n• RS/PV timelines are high risk as FBR synthesizers not yet available.\n• Bachem EZEF Ph3 CT reload campaign underway. \n• Bachem Enzymatic ligation GMP campaign fragments underway. Planning for ligation scale up with two unique enzyme variants\n• Preparing for drug product derived from solution API to enter EZEF global trials late 2026, establishing additional global solution API precedent\n• Preparing for drug product derived from enzymatic ligation to enter CCTA CT and Injection Site Location study, setting EL clinical and regulatory precedent."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Drug ProductStatus: Yellow
"• CCTA Assembly complete. Packaging / labeling / distribution underway. Context: Thermofisher delays put the phase 3 CCTA study start timing at risk; expediting all downstream activities to recover timeline. On track, but on expedited timeline with no buffer.\n• Vetter 1st EL DS Syringe Filling Batch complete.\n• Phase 3 = 200 mg/mL in water. Ph 3 dose decision = 400mg (2mL Tella for Launch). \n• Thermofisher selected as the DP Syringe Filling Commercial Vendor. Thermofisher has consistently missed delivery dates and team is closely watching Thermofisher timing which carries risk to RS timing."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Delivery SystemStatus: Green
"• Ph3 =vial & syringe; 2mL Tella Commercial Launch. \n• ePFS second presentation approved by Lepo LT 23 April 2026. \n• First blinded autoinjector (Tella) assembled and moving towards CCTA study; FPV May 2026 and the injection site location study in 4Q 2026"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CT ConsiderationsStatus:
"• ePFS Investment Strategy Approved: The marketing team has requested ePFS to provide a second delivery system / sku. The device optionality will provide a mechanism for price reference breaking in four geographies, as there is only one dose and one formulation. The lepodisiran leadership team agreed with the rationale (after many months of requesting more information). To that end, CMC will continue to develop second ePFS for launch\n\n• Ph3 dose = 400 mg dosed every 6 and 12 months\n• Considering additional trials: EZEF OLE, Pediatrics, NILEX PAD, and CAVS studies. Additional investment decision point after Novartis Horizon data read out 2H 2026.\n• EZEF LPET achieved with 17.5k patients. \n• Blinded Tella, Solution API (EZEF) and Enzymatic Ligation (EZEJ and Injection Site Location) CT inclusion will be achieved in 2026"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: PediatricsStatus:
Pediatric clinical testing is deferred until adult efficacy and safety is confirmed through EZEF. Study design and additional details to be aligned in the stepwise process. It appears that the EU will require pediatric studies (our waiver request was denied). Dose decision has not been made, however initial thinking indicates that we will not be developing a new dose.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CompetitorStatus:
"•\tTeam anticipates Pelacarsen top line read out 2H 2026 with US submission anticipated in late 2026. Scenario planning underway. Positive data anticipated to lead team to propose additional clinical studies (OLE to help maintain enrolled patients, additional indications like CAVS).\n•\tAdditional clinical studies could demand additional material development. Strategic scenarios have begun."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Sub-Tab: Snapshot
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
• 400 mmol synthesizer at Agilent qualification underway, targeting 3Q 2026 Registration Stability Campaign. Timeline remains high risk.\n• 1.6 mol reactor API EM synthesizer build underway. Timeline and automation remain topics of high interest.On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: 2Q 2026 APIUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
• Preparing for 4Q 2026 Registration Stability at Thermofisher Ferrentino. TF timing carries risk, as TF has missed all delivery dates on this program to date. Team is aware and proactively engaging.\n• Additional clinical resupply campaigns planned\n• ePFS second presentation approved by lead team. CMC Team will move forward with scenarios already in motion.On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: 2Q 2026 DPUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Blinded Tella development complete and preparing for 2026 Ph3 CCTA Trial inclusion.On-time: Green · Timeframe: 2Q 2026 DeviceUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
• CCTA FPV end of May 2026: will include blinded Tella and API generated by enzymatic ligation. \n• Preparing for frozen solution API inclusion in EZEF (regulatory updates)\n• Scenario planning for Horizon data read out (adding new indications / OLE)On-time: Green · Timeframe: 2Q 2026 CTUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]

▸ MAPT siRNA II (Dicerna)

Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Key Updates / DecisionsStatus:
"- MAD Cohort 1 dosing complete January 2026\n- Chronic tox readout late 2025 is clean\n- FDA aligned with dose escalation as of late 2025 (up from 50 mg to 150 mg)\n- Radiolabeled biodistribution study: GMP manufacture completed Nov 2025\n- Tox (DART): surrogate molecule and study planned 2027; not approved scope\n- Ph1 Open label extension: not approved scope"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Key Project Update/DecisionsStatus:
"- 2nd MAD patient showed elevated Troponin level May 2026; decision to continue or stop dosing this patient to be made by end of May\n- 1st MAD patient discontinued Dec 2025 prior to final doses due to elevated Troponin\n- CSF tau knockdown in SAD not showing dose-proportional knockdown\n- Biogen intrathecal ASO efficacy announcement was underwhelming"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Key Project Update/Decisions"- 2nd MAD patient showed elevated Troponin level May 2026; decision to continue or stop dosing this patient to be made by end of May\n- 1st MAD patient discontinued Dec 2025 prior to final doses due to elevated Troponin\n- CSF tau knockdown in SAD not showing dose-proportional knockdown\n- Biogen intrathecal ASO efficacy announcement was underwhelming"NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. ▸ MORF-180
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 16Jun2026Status:
"Governance • October 10, 2025 BOD meeting - Requested $4M for FED Enabling campaign. BOD did not approve (focus on tox concerns). $77K approved for MLA and MetID to assess nitrosamine risk. • November 17, 2025 follow-up: BOD approved $2.5M to purchase starting materials and start API starting materials campaign. • March 13, 2026: BOD chair approved $1M for final steps from API starting materials to Drug Substance."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 16Jun2026Status:
"Phase 1 • SAD/MAD study starting May 2026 (DIC will be used) • rBA study: testing glycolate salt tablets versus capsules; starting late Q4 2026"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 16Jun2026Status:
"Tablets • Team identified glycolate salt form. Has significant sticking issues; suitable for Phase 2a at lower drug load. • Team exploring new tablet salt forms with better properties for later-stage trials/commercialization."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 16Jun2026Status:
"Nitrosamines • 180 is Category 1 nitrosamine (CPCA). Allowable intake: 26.5 ng/day. Control limit: 0.13 ppm (200mg daily dose). • Nitrosamine tests (vendor): EAT negative; MLA and MetID mid-April 2026. • 2026 plans: analytical development, stability, scavengers."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 16Jun2026Status:
"FED Enabling • API campaign kicked off November 2025 following BOD approval. • ~19 months from BOD approval to CT material available."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Key Updates / DecisionsStatus: Green
An alternative linker (MSPT2) is used to impart greater PL stability compared to the MaDap linker in earlier efforts. While better stability expected, plan to use powder PL for Ph1. No driver to use frozen solution (conjugation at CDMO rather than K360 due to bundling)		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Key Updates / DecisionsAn alternative linker (MSPT2) is used to impart greater PL stability compared to the MaDap linker in earlier efforts. While better stability expected, plan to use powder PL for Ph1. No driver to use frozen solution (conjugation at CDMO rather than K360 due to bundling)NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ Muvalaplin
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Drug Substance Development​Status: Green
Testing POCs at scale for long-term %COPS reduction. Further optimization may be implemented at a future campaign. Familiarization work is ongoing at Sterling Germantown and Dudley sites.​		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Analytical​\n\nMethods, Control Strategy"Status: Complete
Nitrosamine method validation to support specification requirement from EMA in process. Anticipated completion date moved to ~3rd week of March. Will implement for batch release and the 9M stability timepoint (Mar 2026).​		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Product​\n\nPh3 Manufacturing"Status: Complete
DP campaign using API-5 re-forecasted to start Apr 2026 due to competing priorities in the coating suite. Puerto Rico committed ot deliver 2026 and 1Q 2027 batches on time. Evaluating second site for placebo and potentially LY CT manufactures to alleviate capacity concerns at PR01.​		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DS DevelopmentStatus: Green
Development work is ongoing to determine physical properties of DS and impact to DP Tabletability.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DP DevelopmentStatus: Green
Studies evaluating order of histidine addition (partial solution addition and dry as pre-blend) are ongoing. Initial results show improvement on compressibility.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CT MaterialsStatus: Green
Program team requested evaluation of accelerated enrollment. Would enroll primary risk patients first (up to total 6,300 pts), then open to secondary at-risk patients (established ASCVD) ~July 2026 to finish enrollment to 10,500 patients. CT supply identified as the gating factor. Initial assessment shows enrollment can increase by label group; label groups 1 (US, JP) and 2 (EU, GB, KR, TW) can enroll now. Label group 3 (AR, BR, CN, IN MX).		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DS TT to WuxiStatus: Green
Wuxi chosen to produce 750kg scale drug substance manufacture (API-7) as mitigation to Sterling. RSM synthesis started. 50kg demo will proceed once RSM1 received from Asymchem.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DS TT to SterlingStatus: Yellow
"Development for convergent route at Sterling in process. Lilly team on site week of 04 May to observe setup and execution of step 3 seeds batch. 13 May: remainder of step 3 workup performed and product now in re-slurry stage."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Key Project Updates/Decisions"- The FHD enabling CMC activities remain on track. The manufacturing of the DP batch at B358 has been completed in the week of Jun 1, and the AFP/releasing testing are ongoing. - Regulatory activities are progressing to support IND submissions on July 31."NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]

NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ N3pG4-CM+
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Key Project Update/DecisionStatus:
"- FTD occurred on January 15. Only LY will be used in the coming tox study, due to lack of efficacy in ex vivo phagocytosis with murine surrogate.\n- The tox study will add a recovery (reversibility) group to the 1-mo GLP tox study due to observed microgliosis, liver enzyme elevations, and red cell changes. As a result, the FHD will be postponed to Q4 26.\n- The FHD enabling CMC activities remain on track. The K360 GMP DS manufacturing has completed. The DP manufacturing has completed, and the AFP/releasing testing are ongoing." Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Key Project Update/Decision"- FTD occurred on January 15. Only LY will be used in the coming tox study, due to lack of efficacy in ex vivo phagocytosis with murine surrogate.\n- The tox study will add a recovery (reversibility) group to the 1-mo GLP tox study due to observed microgliosis, liver enzyme elevations, and red cell changes. As a result, the FHD will be postponed to Q4 26.\n- The FHD enabling CMC activities remain on track. The K360 GMP DS manufacturing has completed. The DP manufacturing has completed, and the AFP/releasing testing are ongoing."NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]

Workstream: ScopeStatus:
"FRD: 16Oct’24 \nUS: FS: 05Mar’27, FA: 05Nov’27, FL: 05Dec’27\nCN: FS 05Apr’27, FA: 14Nov’28, FL: 14Dec’28 \nDS: Ph3/PS at Asymchem. Commercial: Dottikon (RSMs), FIS (Steps 1-4), Kinsale (Step 5). \nDP: Hovione (SDD and Ph3 Capsules) PR01 (Ph3, PS and Commercial)\nPrimary Packaging: IDAP (US bottle), Seishin (JP blister) & Alcobendas (ROW blister)"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

"Module 3 Draft 2 reviews June 2026. Affiliate kick-off meetings in progress, team assessing submission readiness and document availability. \nParticipating in China pilot program, DP PV report not required at submission (PV protocol only). \nDS Step 4 shift from delivery in May’26 to Sep’26 results in shift of DP PV report delivery date to 15Oct’27, gating some wave 1 submissions (JP)."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.

▸ PTH-RANKL
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 11Jun2026Status:
"The meeting was focused on de-risking the tox campaign and enabling Phase 1 readiness under tight timelines. Major risks include low yield due to proteolysis (clipping) and process variability \n\nTeam aligned on multiple “risk-mitigation levers” (e.g., sodium caprylate wash, heat inactivation, depth filtration strategy, formulation antioxidants) while advancing parallel workstreams in formulation, analytical methods, and CLG"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: CMC Meeting Minutes 11Jun2026Status:
"Program Update: Tox tolerability study to start Jun 25, animals will arrive Jun 17"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

▸ QM-GG Effort 1
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Payload Linker​(Asymchem - Dev only; GMP CMO TBD)​Status: Yellow
"Phase 3 PL development workstream on-going. \nDev 1 Process: ~415 g delivered in April; 510 g to be delivered in June\nDev 2 Proces: 500 g in July; ~5 kg GMP in end of Sep. CMO selection/siting for Ph3 GMP behind - awaiting sufficient understanding of process before sending RFPs. PO issued to Asymchem for long lead time raw materials for Ph 3 GMP campaign."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: Fc Scaffold​ (K360)​Status: Yellow
Phase 3 Fc development workstream ongoing. IFB process being pursued per decision at Project Update meeting. IFB process yields high fragment levels; downstream mitigation options being evaluated and results are encouraging. Ph1 GMP Fc batch reprocessing into Ph3 Fc matrix scheduled end of May to enable conjugation process development. 1K Ph3 Demo Fc batch planned in K360 end of June. 1 x 5K IFB GMP batch planned in K360 for mid-Oct and 1 x 5K IFB in Mar ‘27.		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: API​ (Dev – internal / Wuxi XDC; GMP – Wuxi XDC)​Status: Green
"Phase 3 conjugation development workstream (internal): on track with conjugation knowledge being proactively shared with Wuxi \nPhase 3 conjugation development workstream (Wuxi): on track"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: DP ​(Dev – Internal; GMP – TBD)​Status: Green
Phase 3 development workstream on-going using Ph1 material. Preserved formulation POC workstream on-going​		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Fc matrix lock (decision window is by end of May). An existing GMP Fc batch to be reprocessed to align with Ph3 matrix to enable conjugation development work.On-time: Green · Timeframe: MayUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Ph 3 1K Fc demo batch in SUF (~18 kg output); ~415 g of non-GMP PL deliveryOn-time: Green · Timeframe: JuneUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Ph2/3 PL GMP (5 kg) deliveryOn-time: Green · Timeframe: Sep/OctUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
1 x 5K Fc batch in K360 (IFB)On-time: Green · Timeframe: OctUNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]

▸ Retatrutide
Sub-Tab: Overall Status
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Workstream: Key Project Update/DecisionStatus:
"Retatrutide 1st ph3 results (study GZBN). Planned to be submitted as NDA (Nov’26) or BLA (Feb’27). \n\nWM (OA, OSA), T2D, CV & Renal Outcomes, CLBP, MASLD registration enabling trials are underway. MASLD is the 1st ph3 study to include East Asia (China, Japan, Taiwan, and South Korea). Additional NILEX ph3 studies (low-dose, slow titration) underway.\n\nEast Asia (China, Japan, Taiwan, and South Korea) CWM ph3 program deprioritized. Start date TBD."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Substance, \n \nDrug Product/Device  \n(SFS/AI, Cartridge/KwikPen, Vial)\n\nRegistration Stability"Status: Green
"DS campaign completed at WuXi. Registration campaigns at Vetter (SFS), BSP (Vial) and Sesto (Cartridge) completed. \n \nAll DS, and DP/Device (SFS/AI, Cartridge/KP, Vial) 12 month results in Jun’2026. \n\n2.7mL Cartridge/MFD RS started."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Substance\n\nProcess Validation"Status: Red
"DS Supply Chain #1 (Wuxi): Fragments & LPPS completed; and Purification underway (Q2’26). \n\nDS supply chain #2 (Axplora): 6 mo capital delivery delay versus initial plan."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Product  \n(SFS/AI, Cartridge/KwikPen, Vial)\n\nProcess Validation"Status: Yellow
"DP/Device planning underway.\n\nSFS & Vial: Potential impact of Down Time Discard (DTD) results on the PPQ. Study Results: SFS (May’26), Vial (July’26)"		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]

Vetter is planned to supply all future SFS CT needs. Ph3 studies in CWM (OA & OSA), T2D, CV & Renal Outcomes, CLBP, MASLD underway. Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
G3 production resumed post Q4 des-Gly OOS issue. \nFinal batches of CZ SPPS T1 PV in progress. T0 SPPS and Cleavage complete. G2 PVs complete.On-time: Green · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
G3 production resumed post Q4 des-Gly OOS issue. \nSPPS/Cleavage PVs ongoing. G2 PVs complete – line verifications ongoing.On-time: Green · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
FIS F1 material manufactured and onsite at TX. To be included in API CM2/3. Timelines tight for forward processing to API for submission ahead of module lockdown.On-time: Green · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Step 1, 2 PV batches complete. Step 3 PV3 ongoing.On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Eng API offloaded with good yield (116kg). API PV in progress: Disso 2 batches completed, 3rd in progress, RP1 1 batch complete, 1 in progress and RP2 PV to start 25th Feb. Tight for updated DP requirements – working with Wuxi on expedited delivery plan.On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
7 mo capital delivery delay versus initial estimate. There are alternate paths to achieve Axplora's on time inclusion in the first submission for NDA and BLA scenarios.On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Filling control strategy for clogged needles and needle residue under development. To be confirmed in demo batch Jun/July 2026.On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]
Potential impact of DTD results on the PPQ. Study started: Feb'26\nFiltration Validation: Bacterial Retention fail. Retest to plan in Q2'26On-time: Yellow · Timeframe: UNVERIFIABLE this session — R2 Snapshot Tasks live report has no Sheet Name column (same structural gap as R3).[UNVERIFIABLE]

Sub-Tab: Decision
Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
Key Project Update/Decision"Retatrutide 1st ph3 results (study GZBN). Planned to be submitted as NDA (Nov’26) or BLA (Feb’27). \n\nWM (OA, OSA), T2D, CV & Renal Outcomes, CLBP, MASLD registration enabling trials are underway. MASLD is the 1st ph3 study to include East Asia (China, Japan, Taiwan, and South Korea). Additional NILEX ph3 studies (low-dose, slow titration) underway.\n\nEast Asia (China, Japan, Taiwan, and South Korea) CWM ph3 program deprioritized. Start date TBD."NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.[N/A — SEE NOTE]

No decision-like workstream entries found for this project. NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.

NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.

Workstream: ScopeStatus:
"FRD: 17Nov’25.  US: FS: Nov’27, FA: Sep’28, DL:PS at WuXi XDC mAb: PS at WuXi Bio DS: PS at WuXi XDC DP: PS at WuXi XDC Commercial: DL: WuXi XDC  mAb: WuXi Bio.  DS: BSP Italy DP: BSP Italy Packaging: 20ml Vial Fegersheim & Seishin. BTD was granted 14Jan2026." Workstream: Reg  StabStatus: Green
"DL –complete . mAb : complete, DS: complete and DP: on track \nDP RS last batch is targeted to set down September 2026. Each batch being set down as it is completed (not batched)."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Linker \n PV\n Wuxi XDC"Status: Yellow
"RSM: Manufacturing of 3 RSMs complete and on site\n\nPAR work: Method qualification for specs occurring in parallel with PAR/spiking studies. Mitigation: Method qualification designed much wider than planned specifications to allow for adjustments, if necessary, based on C3 output. \n\nAnalytical methods:Cpd D; March 17; Exatecan; Apr 3, Cpd E1;May 1, Cpd E; May 31, SM4B; June 14, Drug Linker (FP) \n\nPV (E1 step) was started on 7Apr2026, step 2 (Cpd E) was initiated on 16May2026, and step 3 (FP) is targeted to start 20Jul2026."		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: mAb PVWuXi BioStatus: Green
Vial thaw occurred on14Mar2026. Four PPQ batches have been completed in manufacturing and they have been placed on stability		UNVERIFIABLE this session - R3 Overall Status live report has no Sheet Name column (see prior structural finding); cannot independently pull this project's raw Overall Status rows without a per-sheet-id name resolution pass not performed this session.[UNVERIFIABLE]
Workstream: "Drug Substance ADC \n PV"Status: Green
Long lead time items (TFF and freezers) have been orders. BSP Italy was audited by GQAAC during the week of January 20th. BSP DS CT lot to be mfg. July 2026 (DS) with PPQ to initiate Nov. 2026. Data ElementDashboard Sub-Tab DataRaw Source DocumentationStatus
No decision-like workstream entries found for this project. NOTE: "Decision" is not a distinct drawer tab in this dashboard build — no such UI element or PROGRAMS[] field exists. The rows shown here are workstream entries whose name or text contains "decision" or "update", shown as the closest analog. Source verification carries the same R3 Sheet Name limitation as Overall Status.
Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.
▸ Solbinsiran

Sub-Tab: Supply Chain Node
NOT A REAL TAB on the dashboard side — no "supply chain node" field exists anywhere in PROGRAMS[]. On the source side, the S1 Intake "Supply Chain Node" column (index 15) returned the literal placeholder text "Supply Chain Node" (the column header itself) for all 143 rows including this project — the field is unpopulated portfolio-wide.

Section: Mfg Roadmap. Every task the dashboard's Mfg Roadmap (ALL_SCHED) renders for each of its 118 covered projects — 8,294 tasks total — checked against the live R6 Schedule Detail report by exact task name and start date. 6,657 verified, 1,353 genuine discrepancies, and 284 rows marked N/A because they are dashboard-only structural grouping headers (e.g. "Schedule", "High Level Clinical") never expected to exist as a literal source row. 31 projects with live R6 schedule data have no Mfg Roadmap entry at all — listed below.

P2.01 hcDNA comparability acceptance criteria: ≤ 6.0 pg/µL.\nOne P2.01 comparability lot fails this criteria\nP2.0 comparability lots are ≤ 2.0 pg/µL and were below the method LOQ.\nA root cause assessment investigation was launched as well as a comprehensive review of process differences, deviations, cell culture trends, equipment and material used, etc.P2.01 hcDNA comparability acceptance criteria: ≤ 6.0 pg/µL.\nOne P2.01 comparability lot fails this criteria\nP2.0 comparability lots are ≤ 2.0 pg/µL and were below the method LOQ.\nA root cause assessment investigation was launched as well as a comprehensive review of process differences, deviations, cell culture trends, equipment and material used, etc.[VERIFIED]
MVB1s (now depleted) were used for clinical manufacturing of Ph1, Ph2, and Ph3 material. \nMVB2A (MVB1 resupply) is planned to support manufacturing through PPQ, with MVB2B as a backup\nRisk of depletion prior to commercialization or during PPQ if issues occur\nMOI decrease during PVSS Mfg was recommended to extend runway, but is no longer being pursued to minimize process risk (Q1 2026)\nThe parent AVBs (research grade) used for MVB1s and MVB2s are depleted\n\nThe "Re-Plaque" project initiated parallel to MVB2A Manufacturing in 2023 to mitigate the risk of depleting MVB1s used in Ph1 and Ph2 manufacturing. The intention was to implement as a 2-tier GMP viral banking system (GMP MVB3, GMP WVB3) to align with industry standards. The GMP MVB3/WVB3 banks were planned for production in 2025, but was held off due to company finances.MVB1s (now depleted) were used for clinical manufacturing of Ph1, Ph2, and Ph3 material. \nMVB2A (MVB1 resupply) is planned to support manufacturing through PPQ, with MVB2B as a backup\nRisk of depletion prior to commercialization or during PPQ if issues occur\nMOI decrease during PVSS Mfg was recommended to extend runway, but is no longer being pursued to minimize process risk (Q1 2026)\nThe parent AVBs (research grade) used for MVB1s and MVB2s are depleted\n\nThe “Re-Plaque” project initiated parallel to MVB2A Manufacturing in 2023 to mitigate the risk of depleting MVB1s used in Ph1 and Ph2 manufacturing. The intention was to implement as a 2-tier GMP viral banking system (GMP MVB3, GMP WVB3) to align with industry standards. The GMP MVB3/WVB3 banks were planned for production in 2025, but was held off due to company finances.[DISCREPANCY] DISCREPANCY

This CP is historically strong; however, Lilly has not asked PPD to own method development before and they have not tested monthly incretin molecules to date.Secure sufficient analytical staffing to allow close partnership between Lilly with PPD for method development and qualification.Technical and/or timeline hurdles due to sourcing method development and GMP testing at PPD for DS and DP. Dashboard Risk Desc.Dashboard MitigationSource Risk Desc. (R4)Source Mitigation (R4)Status
Payload Linker instability (hydrolysis) causing scalability challengesPh1: Cold, expedited, and batched processing where possible. Isolate as solid. \n\nPh2 & beyond: PPC has endorsed TFA-amide route for QM-GGGs if data is consistent with QM-GG.Payload Linker instability (hydrolysis) causing scalability challengesPh1: Cold, expedited, and batched processing where possible. Isolate as solid. Ph2 & beyond: PPC has endorsed TFA-amide route for QM-GGGs if data is consistent with QM-GG.[VERIFIED]
Significant increase in TAVs during DP patient in-use period (RT storage)1) Optimize formulation, 2) Complete dataset to understand whether rearranged MalDap is a CQA. Alternatively, limit in-use at RT and no preserved DP option[DISCREPANCY] DISCREPANCY
Deprotection after Fc conjugation results in DS degradationConjugation and deprotection process optimization[DISCREPANCY] DISCREPANCY
Bioequivalence criteria not met, if bridging between DP presentations is requiredIntroduce planned primary commercial presentation into Ph 3[DISCREPANCY] DISCREPANCY
PL instability on stability results in short intermediate shelf-lifeUnderstand root cause and determine whether switch to Tfa-MalDap resolves. If not, evaluate deep freeze (-60 rather than -20)[DISCREPANCY] DISCREPANCY
